revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''当麻皇子'''（とうまのみこ、生没年不詳）は、[[6世紀]]後半から[[7世紀]]初期にかけての[[皇族]]。'''麻呂子皇子'''とも...'
revision.text:
'''当麻皇子'''（とうまのみこ、生没年不詳）は、[[6世紀]]後半から[[7世紀]]初期にかけての[[皇族]]。'''麻呂子皇子'''ともいう。父は[[用明天皇]]。母は当麻倉日子の娘とも、葛城直磐村の娘とも言われる。妻は[[欽明天皇]]の皇女舎人皇女。
[[602年]]（[[推古天皇]]10年）[[征新羅将軍]]であった異母兄弟の[[来目皇子]]が没した後、翌年の[[603年]]4月に征新羅将軍となった。[[難波]]から船で出発したが、[[播磨国]][[明石]]で妻である舎人皇女が没したことから、皇女を明かしに葬った後引き返したという。
[[Category:飛鳥・奈良時代の皇族|とうまのみこ]]

'''当麻皇子'''（とうまのみこ、生没年不詳）は、[[6世紀]]後半から[[7世紀]]初期にかけての[[皇族]]。'''麻呂子皇子'''ともいう。父は[[用明天皇]]。母は当麻倉日子の娘とも、葛城直磐村の娘とも言われる。妻は[[欽明天皇]]の皇女舎人皇女。
[[602年]]（[[推古天皇]]10年）[[征新羅将軍]]であった異母兄弟の[[来目皇子]]が没した後、翌年の[[603年]]4月に征新羅将軍となった。[[難波]]から船で出発したが、[[播磨国]][[明石]]で妻である舎人皇女が没したことから、皇女を明石に葬った後引き返したという。
[[Category:飛鳥・奈良時代の皇族|とうまのみこ]]

'''当麻皇子'''（とうまのみこ、生没年不詳）は、[[6世紀]]後半から[[7世紀]]初期にかけての[[皇族]]。'''麻呂子皇子'''ともいう。父は[[用明天皇]]。母は当麻倉日子の娘とも、葛城直磐村の娘とも言われる。妻は[[欽明天皇]]の皇女舎人皇女。
[[602年]]（[[推古天皇]]10年）[[征新羅将軍]]であった異母兄弟の[[来目皇子]]が没した後、翌年の[[603年]]4月に征新羅将軍となった。[[難波]]から船で出発したが、[[播磨国]][[明石]]で妻である舎人皇女が没したことから、皇女を明石に葬った後引き返したという。
== 関連項目 == *[[當麻寺]] - 当麻皇子の開基とされる
[[Category:飛鳥・奈良時代の皇族|とうまのみこ]]

'''当麻皇子'''（とうまのみこ、生没年不詳）は、[[6世紀]]後半から[[7世紀]]初期にかけての[[皇族]]。'''麻呂子皇子'''ともいう。[[用明天皇]]の皇子。
[[602年]]（[[推古天皇]]10年）[[征新羅将軍]]であった異母兄弟の[[来目皇子]]が没した後、翌年の[[603年]]4月に征新羅将軍となった。[[難波]]から船で出発したが、[[播磨国]][[明石]]で妻である舎人皇女が没したことから、皇女を明石に葬った後引き返したという。
== 系譜 == *父：用明天皇 *母：葛城広子（葛城（直）磐村の娘）または当麻倉日子の娘 *妻：舎人皇女（[[欽明天皇]]の皇女） *生母不明 **男子：束田王<ref name="s">鈴木真年『諸系譜』巻6 都留（宝賀寿男『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会,1986年 による）</ref> **男子：忍田王<ref name="s" /> **男子：当麻豊浜<ref>鈴木真年『百家系図稿』巻9 登美真人（宝賀寿男『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会,1986年 による）</ref>（?-681）
== 関連項目 == *[[當麻寺]] - 当麻皇子の開基とされる
== 脚注 == {{reflist}}
[[Category:飛鳥・奈良時代の皇族|とうまのみこ]]

'''当麻皇子'''（たいまのみこ、[[敏達天皇]]3年（[[574年]]?）以降[[用明天皇]]元年（[[586年]]?）以前 - 没年不詳）は、[[6世紀]]後半から[[7世紀]]初期にかけての[[皇族]]。'''麻呂子皇子'''ともいう。[[用明天皇]]の第三皇子。[[聖徳太子]]の異母弟。
[[602年]]（[[推古天皇]]10年）[[征新羅将軍]]であった異母弟の[[来目皇子]]が没した後、翌年の[[603年]]4月に征新羅将軍となった。[[難波]]から船で出発したが、[[播磨国]][[明石]]で妻である[[舎人皇女]]が没したことから、皇女を明石に葬った後引き返したという。

== 関連項目 == *[[當麻寺]] - 当麻皇子の開基とされる *[[多禰寺]]（舞鶴市） - 同上
== 脚注 == {{reflist}}
[[Category:飛鳥時代の皇族|たいまのみこ]]

'''当麻皇子'''（たいまのみこ、[[敏達天皇]]3年（[[574年]]?）以降[[用明天皇]]元年（[[586年]]?）以前 - 没年不詳）は、[[6世紀]]後半から[[7世紀]]初期にかけての[[皇族]]。'''麻呂子皇子'''ともいう。[[用明天皇]]の第三皇子。[[聖徳太子]]の異母弟。
[[602年]]（[[推古天皇]]10年）[[征新羅将軍]]であった異母弟の[[来目皇子]]が没した後、翌年の[[603年]]4月に征新羅将軍となった。[[難波]]から船で出発したが、[[播磨国]][[明石]]で妻である[[舎人皇女]]が没したことから、皇女を明石に葬った後引き返したという。
== 系譜 == *父：用明天皇 *母：[[葛城広子]]（葛城（直）磐村の娘）または当麻倉日子の娘 *妻：舎人皇女（[[欽明天皇]]の皇女） *生母不明 **男子：[[束田王]]<ref name="s">鈴木真年『諸系譜』巻6 都留（宝賀寿男『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会,1986年 による）</ref> **男子：[[忍田王]]<ref name="s" /> **男子：[[当麻豊浜]]<ref>鈴木真年『百家系図稿』巻9 登美真人（宝賀寿男『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会,1986年 による）</ref>（?-681）

[[Category:飛鳥時代の男性皇族|たいまのみこ]]

'''当麻皇子'''（たいまのみこ、[[敏達天皇]]3年（[[574年]]?）以降[[用明天皇]]元年（[[586年]]?）以前 - 没年不詳）は、[[6世紀]]後半から[[7世紀]]初期にかけての[[皇族]]。'''麻呂子皇子'''ともいう。[[用明天皇]]の第三皇子で母は[[葛城広子]]（葛城直磐村または当麻倉日子の女）<ref>『[[日本書紀]]』</ref><ref>『[[本朝皇胤紹運録]]』</ref>または葛木伊比古郎女（葛木当麻倉首比里古の女）<ref>『[[古事記]]』</ref>。[[酢香手姫皇女]]の同母兄、[[聖徳太子]]の異母弟。
[[602年]]（[[推古天皇]]10年）[[征新羅将軍]]であった異母弟の[[来目皇子]]が没した後、翌年の[[603年]]4月に征新羅将軍となった。[[難波]]から船で出発したが、[[播磨国]][[明石]]で妻である[[舎人皇女]]が没したことから、皇女を明石に葬った後引き返したという。
== 系譜 == *父：用明天皇 *母：[[葛城広子]]（葛城（直）磐村の娘）または当麻倉日子の娘（あるいは葛木当麻倉首比里古の娘） *妻：舎人皇女（[[欽明天皇]]の皇女） *生母不明 **男子：[[束田王]]<ref name="s">鈴木真年『諸系譜』巻6 都留（宝賀寿男『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会,1986年 による）</ref> **男子：[[忍田王]]<ref name="s" /> **男子：[[当麻豊浜]]<ref>鈴木真年『百家系図稿』巻9 登美真人（宝賀寿男『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会,1986年 による）</ref>（?-681）
== 関連項目 == *[[當麻寺]] - 当麻皇子の開基とされる *[[多禰寺]]（舞鶴市） - 同上
== 脚注 == {{reflist}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいまのみこ}} [[Category:飛鳥時代の男性皇族]]

'''当麻皇子'''（たいまのみこ、[[敏達天皇]]3年（[[574年]]?）以降[[用明天皇]]元年（[[586年]]?）以前 - 没年不詳）は、[[6世紀]]後半から[[7世紀]]初期にかけての[[皇族]]。'''麻呂子皇子'''ともいう。[[用明天皇]]の第三皇子で母は[[葛城広子]]（葛城直磐村または当麻倉日子の女）<ref>『[[日本書紀]]』</ref><ref>『[[本朝皇胤紹運録]]』</ref>または葛木伊比古郎女（葛木当麻倉首比里古の女）<ref>『[[古事記]]』</ref>。[[酢香手姫皇女]]の同母兄、[[聖徳太子]]の異母弟。
[[602年]]（[[推古天皇]]10年）[[征新羅大将軍]]であった異母弟の[[来目皇子]]が没した後、翌年の[[603年]]4月に征新羅将軍となった。[[難波]]から船で出発したが、[[播磨国]][[明石]]で妻である[[舎人皇女]]が没したことから、皇女を明石に葬った後引き返したという。
== 系譜 == *父：用明天皇 *母：[[葛城広子]]（葛城（直）磐村の娘）または当麻倉日子の娘（あるいは葛木当麻倉首比里古の娘） *妻：舎人皇女（[[欽明天皇]]の皇女） *生母不明 **男子：[[束田王]]<ref name="s">鈴木真年『諸系譜』巻6 都留（宝賀寿男『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会,1986年 による）</ref> **男子：[[忍田王]]<ref name="s" /> **男子：[[当麻豊浜]]<ref>鈴木真年『百家系図稿』巻9 登美真人（宝賀寿男『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会,1986年 による）</ref>（?-681）

[[当麻豊浜]] | 父親 = [[用明天皇]]（第31代[[天皇]]） | 母親 = [[葛城広子]]（[[葛城直磐村]]または[[当麻倉日子]]の女）『[[日本書紀]]』『[[本朝皇胤紹運録]]』または[[葛木伊比古郎]]女（[[葛木当麻倉首比里古]]の女）『[[古事記]]』 | 役職 = 征新羅将軍 | 宗教 = | サイン = }} '''当麻皇子'''（たいまのみこ、[[敏達天皇]]3年（[[574年]]?）以降[[用明天皇]]元年（[[586年]]?）以前 - 没年不詳）は、[[古墳時代]]後期から[[飛鳥時代]]前期（[[6世紀]]後半から[[7世紀]]初期）にかけての[[皇族]]。'''麻呂子皇子'''ともいう。[[用明天皇]]の第三皇子で母は[[葛城広子]]（葛城直磐村または当麻倉日子の女）『[[日本書紀]]』『[[本朝皇胤紹運録]]』または葛木伊比古郎女（葛木当麻倉首比里古の女）『[[古事記]]』。[[酢香手姫皇女]]の同母兄、[[聖徳太子]]の異母弟。 [[602年]]（[[推古天皇]]10年）[[征新羅大将軍]]であった異母弟の[[来目皇子]]が[[崩御#薨去|薨去]]した後、翌年の[[603年]]4月に征新羅将軍となった。[[難波]]から船で出発したが、[[播磨国]][[明石]]で妻である[[舎人皇女]]が[[崩御#薨去|薨去]]したことから、皇女を明石に葬った後引き返したという。 __TOC__{{-}} == 系譜 == * 父：用明天皇 * 母：[[葛城広子]]（葛城（直）磐村の娘）または当麻倉日子の娘（あるいは葛木当麻倉首比里古の娘） * 妻：舎人皇女（[[欽明天皇]]の皇女） * 生母不明 ** 男子：[[束田王]][[鈴木真年]]『諸系譜』巻6 都留（[[宝賀寿男]]『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会,1986年（昭和60年） による） ** 男子：[[忍田王]] ** 男子：[[当麻豊浜]]鈴木真年『百家系図稿』巻9 登美真人（宝賀寿男『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会,1986年（昭和60年） による）（? - [[681年]]） == 関連項目 == * [[當麻寺]] - 当麻皇子の開基とされる * [[多禰寺]]（[[舞鶴市]]） - 同上 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たいまのみこ}} [[Category:飛鳥時代の男性皇族]]

[[当麻豊浜]] | 父親 = [[用明天皇]]（第31代[[天皇]]） | 母親 = [[葛城広子]]（[[葛城磐村]]の女）または[[葛木伊比古郎女]]（[[葛木当麻倉首比里古]]の女） | 役職 = 征新羅将軍 | 宗教 = | サイン = }} '''当麻皇子'''（たいまのみこ、[[敏達天皇]]3年（[[574年]]?）以降[[用明天皇]]元年（[[586年]]?）以前 - 没年不詳）は、[[古墳時代]]後期から[[飛鳥時代]]前期にかけての[[皇族]]。'''麻呂子皇子'''ともいう。[[用明天皇]]の第三皇子。 == 経歴 == [[推古天皇]]10年（[[602年]]）[[征新羅大将軍]]であった異母弟の[[来目皇子]]が[[崩御#薨去|薨去]]した後、翌推古天皇11年（[[603年]]）4月に征新羅将軍となった。[[難波]]から船で出発したが、[[播磨国]][[明石]]で妻である[[舎人皇女]]が[[崩御#薨去|薨去]]したことから、皇女を明石に葬った後引き返したという。 == 系譜 == * 父：[[用明天皇]] * 母：[[葛城広子]]（葛城磐村の娘）『[[日本書紀]]』『[[本朝皇胤紹運録]]』、または葛木伊比古郎女（葛木当麻倉首比里古または当麻倉日子の娘の女）『[[古事記]]』、 * 妻：舎人皇女（[[欽明天皇]]の皇女） * 生母不詳の子女 ** 男子：[[束田王]][[鈴木真年]]『諸系譜』巻6 都留 ** 男子：[[忍田王]] ** 男子：[[当麻豊浜]]鈴木真年『百家系図稿』巻9 登美真人（?-681） == 関連項目 == * [[當麻寺]] - 当麻皇子の開基とされる * [[多禰寺]]（[[舞鶴市]]） - 同上 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *宇治谷孟『日本書紀 （下）』[[講談社学術文庫]]、1988年 *宝賀寿男『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会、1986年 {{DEFAULTSORT:たいまのみこ}} [[Category:飛鳥時代の男性皇族]] [[Category:6世紀生]] [[Category:7世紀没]]

{{基礎情報 皇族・貴族 | 人名 = 当麻皇子 | 各国語表記 = | 家名・爵位 = | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 続柄 = 第31代[[用明天皇]]の第3[[皇子]] | 称号 = | 全名 = | 身位 = | 敬称 = | お印 = | 出生日 = [[敏達天皇]]3年（[[574年]]?）以降、[[用明天皇]]元年（[[586年]]?）以前 | 生地 = | 死亡日 = 不詳 | 没地 = | 埋葬日 = | 埋葬地 = | 配偶者1 = [[舎人皇女]]（[[欽明天皇]]の[[皇女]]） | 配偶者2 = | 配偶者3 = | 配偶者4 = | 配偶者5 = | 配偶者6 = | 配偶者7 = | 配偶者8 = | 配偶者9 = | 配偶者10 = | 子女 = [[束田王]]
[[忍田王]]
[[当麻豊浜]]
[[当麻広島]] | 父親 = [[用明天皇]]（第31代[[天皇]]） | 役職 = 征新羅将軍 | 宗教 = | サイン = }} '''当麻 皇子'''（たいま の みこ、[[敏達天皇]]3年（[[574年]]?）以降[[用明天皇]]元年（[[586年]]?）以前 - 没年不詳）は、[[古墳時代]]後期から[[飛鳥時代]]前期にかけての[[皇族]]。'''麻呂子皇子'''ともいう。[[用明天皇]]の第三皇子。子孫に中級官人となった当麻氏と大和高田を中心として活躍した平田党武家当麻高田氏が出ている == 経歴 == [[推古天皇]]10年（[[602年]]）、[[征新羅大将軍]]であった異母弟の[[来目皇子]]が[[崩御#薨去|薨去]]した後、翌推古天皇11年（[[603年]]）4月に征新羅将軍となった。[[難波]]から船で出発したが、[[播磨国]]・[[明石]]で妻である[[舎人皇女]]が[[崩御#薨去|薨去]]したことから、皇女を明石に葬った後引き返したという。 == 系譜 == * 父：[[用明天皇]] * 母：[[葛城広子]]（葛城磐村の娘）『[[日本書紀]]』『[[本朝皇胤紹運録]]』、または葛木伊比古郎女（葛木当麻倉首比里古または当麻倉日子の娘）『[[古事記]]』 * 妻：舎人皇女（[[欽明天皇]]の皇女） * 生母不詳の子女 ** 男子：[[束田王]][[鈴木真年]]『諸系譜』巻6 都留 ** 男子：[[忍田王]]{{Efn|子に[[当麻桜井]]（[[武蔵国司]]）。}} ** 男子：[[当麻豊浜]]鈴木真年『百家系図稿』巻9 登美真人（? - 681） ** 男子：当麻広島（? - 672） == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * {{Cite book|和書|author=宇治谷孟|authorlink=宇治谷孟|title=日本書紀|volume=下|series=[[講談社学術文庫]]|year=1988}} * {{Cite book|和書|author=宝賀寿男|authorlink=宝賀寿男|title=古代氏族系譜集成|publisher=古代氏族研究会|year=1986}} == 関連項目 == * [[當麻寺]] - 当麻皇子の開基とされる * [[多禰寺]]（[[舞鶴市]]） - 同上 {{デフォルトソート:たいま の みこ}} [[Category:飛鳥時代の男性皇族]] [[Category:用明天皇の子女]] [[Category:6世紀生]] [[Category:7世紀没]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:当麻皇子]][[ko:타이마노미코]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0550|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097}}|spouse={{ill|Toneri no himemiko|qid=Q106095792}}|children={{ill|Toyohama Taima|qid=Q17225062}}|father={{ill|Yōmei|qid=Q349281}}|relatives={{ill|Kume|qid=Q11523737}}; {{ill|Prince Ekuri|qid=Q11547041}}; {{ill|Prince Manda|qid=Q11617932}}; {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|qid=Q263972}}; {{ill|Prince Tame|qid=Q11577211}}; {{ill|Sukatehime no Himemiko|qid=Q11644412}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11487858]] Wikidata name: Taima no miko [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox royalty | name = Prince Taima | native_name = 当麻皇子 | family_name & title = | image = | image_size = | image_caption = | relation = Third [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|son]] of the 31st [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] | title = | full_name = | Rank = | honorific = | emblem = | birth_date = [[Emperor Bidatsu]] 3 (c. [[:en:574|574]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] 1 (c. [[:en:586|586]]) | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = | burial_place = | spouse1 = {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]) | spouse2 = | children = | father = [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] (31st [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]]) | position = General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍) | religion = | signature = }}
Prince Taima (当麻皇子, たいま の みこ; born between '''Emperor Bidatsu 3''' (574?) and '''Emperor Yōmei 1''' (586?), date of death unknown) was a '''prince''' of the late '''Kofun period''' to the early '''Asuka period'''. He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.
== '''Career''' == In '''Suiko 10 (602)''', after his half-brother '''Prince Kurume (来目皇子)''', the Commander-in-Chief of the '''Expedition to Silla (征新羅大将軍)''', passed away, '''Prince Taima''' was appointed '''General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍)''' in '''Suiko 11 (603)'''.
He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.
== '''Lineage''' == * '''Father''': [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * '''Mother''': {{ill|Katsuragi Hiroko|ja|葛城広子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Hiroko|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of '''Katsuragi Iwamura''' (葛城磐村))<ref name="shoki">『[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]』</ref><ref name="shou">『{{ill|Honchō kōin jōunroku|ja|本朝皇胤紹運録|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honchō kōin jōunroku|qq=|1=Honchō Kōin Shōunroku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520403}}』</ref>, or '''Katsuragi Ihibiko no Iratsume''' (葛木伊比古郎女), daughter of '''Taimadera Kura-no-Muraji Hiriko (当麻倉首比里古)''' or '''Taimadera Kura-no-Hiko (当麻倉日子)'''.<ref name="kojiki">『[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]』</ref> * '''Wife''': {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]
== '''Notes''' == {{Notelist}}
== '''References''' == {{Reflist}}
== '''Bibliography''' == * {{Cite book|和書|author={{ill|Ujitani Tsutomu|ja|宇治谷孟|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ujitani Tsutomu|qq=|1=Tsutomu Ujitani|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449517}}|title=[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]|volume=Volume 2|series={{ill|Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko|ja|講談社学術文庫|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko|qq=|1=Kōdansha gakujutsu bunko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632220}}|year=1988}} * {{Cite book|和書|author={{ill|Hōga Toshio|ja|宝賀寿男|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōga Toshio|qq=|1=Toshio Hōga|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452691}}|title=Collection of Ancient Clan Genealogies (古代氏族系譜集成)|publisher=Ancient Clan Research Association (古代氏族研究会)|year=1986}}
== '''Related Topics''' == * [[:en:Taima-dera|Taimadera]] – Said to have been founded by '''Prince Taima'''. * {{ill|Taneji Temple|ja|多禰寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taneji Temple|qq=|1=Tane-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430998}} ([[:en:Maizuru|Maizuru]]) – Also said to have been founded by him. * [[Seishin Dai Shogun]] * {{ill|Prince Maroko|lt=Prince Maroko|lt=Prince Tōma|ja|当麻皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Tōma|qq=}} * [[Kōtai Shrine|Kotai Shrine]] * [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]

Prince Taima (当麻皇子, たいま の みこ; born between '''Emperor Bidatsu 3''' (574?) and '''Emperor Yōmei 1''' (586?), date of death unknown) was a '''prince''' of the late '''Kofun period''' to the early '''Asuka period'''. He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.
== '''Career''' == In '''Suiko 10 (602)''', after his half-brother '''Prince Kurume (来目皇子)''', the Commander-in-Chief of the '''Expedition to Silla (征新羅大将軍)''', passed away, '''Prince Taima''' was appointed '''General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍)''' in '''Suiko 11 (603)'''.
He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.
== '''Lineage''' == * '''Father''': [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * '''Mother''': {{ill|Katsuragi Hiroko|ja|葛城広子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Hiroko|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of '''Katsuragi Iwamura''' (葛城磐村))<ref name="shoki">『[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]』</ref><ref name="shou">『{{ill|Honchō kōin jōunroku|ja|本朝皇胤紹運録|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honchō kōin jōunroku|qq=|1=Honchō Kōin Shōunroku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520403}}』</ref>, or '''Katsuragi Ihibiko no Iratsume''' (葛木伊比古郎女), daughter of '''Taimadera Kura-no-Muraji Hiriko (当麻倉首比里古)''' or '''Taimadera Kura-no-Hiko (当麻倉日子)'''.<ref name="kojiki">『[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]』</ref> * '''Wife''': {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]

Prince Taima (当麻皇子, たいま の みこ; born between '''Emperor Bidatsu 3''' (574?) and '''Emperor Yōmei 1''' (586?), date of death unknown) was a '''prince''' of the late '''Kofun period''' to the early '''Asuka period'''. He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.
== '''Career''' == In '''Suiko 10 (602)''', after his half-brother '''Prince Kurume (来目皇子)''', the Commander-in-Chief of the '''Expedition to Silla (征新羅大将軍)''', passed away, '''Prince Taima''' was appointed '''General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍)''' in '''Suiko 11 (603)'''.
He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.

Prince Taima (当麻皇子, たいま の みこ; born between '''Emperor Bidatsu 3''' (574?) and '''Emperor Yōmei 1''' (586?), date of death unknown) was a '''prince''' of the late '''Kofun period''' to the early '''Asuka period'''. He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.
== '''Career''' == In '''Suiko 10 (602)''', after his half-brother '''Prince Kurume (来目皇子)''', the Commander-in-Chief of the '''Expedition to Silla (征新羅大将軍)''', passed away, '''Prince Taima''' was appointed '''General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍)''' in '''Suiko 11 (603)'''.
He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.
== '''Lineage''' == * '''Father''': [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * '''Mother''': {{ill|Katsuragi Hiroko|ja|葛城広子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Hiroko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of '''Katsuragi Iwamura''' (葛城磐村))<ref name="shoki">『[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]』</ref><ref name="shou">『{{ill|Honchō kōin jōunroku|ja|本朝皇胤紹運録|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honchō kōin jōunroku|1=Honchō Kōin Shōunroku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520403}}』</ref>, or '''Katsuragi Ihibiko no Iratsume''' (葛木伊比古郎女), daughter of '''Taimadera Kura-no-Muraji Hiriko (当麻倉首比里古)''' or '''Taimadera Kura-no-Hiko (当麻倉日子)'''.<ref name="kojiki">『[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]』</ref> * '''Wife''': {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]

He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.

[[:en:574|574]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] 1 (c. [[:en:586|586]]) | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = | burial_place = | spouse1 = {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]) | spouse2 = | children = | father = [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] (31st [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]]) | position = General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍) | religion = | signature = }}
Prince Taima (当麻皇子, たいま の みこ; born between '''Emperor Bidatsu 3''' (574?) and '''Emperor Yōmei 1''' (586?), date of death unknown) was a '''prince''' of the late '''Kofun period''' to the early '''Asuka period'''. He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.
== '''Career''' == In '''Suiko 10 (602)''', after his half-brother '''Prince Kurume (来目皇子)''', the Commander-in-Chief of the '''Expedition to Silla (征新羅大将軍)''', passed away, '''Prince Taima''' was appointed '''General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍)''' in '''Suiko 11 (603)'''.
He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.
== '''Lineage''' == * '''Father''': [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * '''Mother''': {{ill|Katsuragi Hiroko|ja|葛城広子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Hiroko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of '''Katsuragi Iwamura''' (葛城磐村))<ref name="shoki">『[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]』</ref><ref name="shou">『{{ill|Honchō kōin jōunroku|ja|本朝皇胤紹運録|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honchō kōin jōunroku|1=Honchō Kōin Shōunroku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520403}}』</ref>, or '''Katsuragi Ihibiko no Iratsume''' (葛木伊比古郎女), daughter of '''Taimadera Kura-no-Muraji Hiriko (当麻倉首比里古)''' or '''Taimadera Kura-no-Hiko (当麻倉日子)'''.<ref name="kojiki">『[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]』</ref> * '''Wife''': {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]

Prince Taima (当麻皇子, たいま の みこ; born between '''Emperor Bidatsu 3''' (574?) and '''Emperor Yōmei 1''' (586?), date of death unknown) was a '''prince''' of the late '''Kofun period''' to the early '''Asuka period'''. He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.

[[:en:574|574]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] 1 (c. [[:en:586|586]]) | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = | burial_place = | spouse1 = {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]) | spouse2 = | children = | father = [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] (31st [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]]) | position = General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍) | religion = | signature = }}
Prince Taima (当麻皇子, たいま の みこ; born between '''Emperor Bidatsu 3''' (574?) and '''Emperor Yōmei 1''' (586?), date of death unknown) was a '''prince''' of the late '''Kofun period''' to the early '''Asuka period'''. He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.
== '''Career''' == In '''Suiko 10 (602)''', after his half-brother '''Prince Kurume (来目皇子)''', the Commander-in-Chief of the '''Expedition to Silla (征新羅大将軍)''', passed away, '''Prince Taima''' was appointed '''General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍)''' in '''Suiko 11 (603)'''.
He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.
== '''Lineage''' == * '''Father''': [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * '''Mother''': {{ill|Katsuragi Hiroko|ja|葛城広子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Hiroko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of '''Katsuragi Iwamura''' (葛城磐村))<ref name="shoki">『[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]』</ref><ref name="shou">『{{ill|Honchō kōin jōunroku|ja|本朝皇胤紹運録|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honchō kōin jōunroku|1=Honchō Kōin Shōunroku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520403}}』</ref>, or '''Katsuragi Ihibiko no Iratsume''' (葛木伊比古郎女), daughter of '''Taimadera Kura-no-Muraji Hiriko (当麻倉首比里古)''' or '''Taimadera Kura-no-Hiko (当麻倉日子)'''.<ref name="kojiki">『[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]』</ref> * '''Wife''': {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]

Prince Taima (当麻皇子, たいま の みこ; born between '''Emperor Bidatsu 3''' (574?) and '''Emperor Yōmei 1''' (586?), date of death unknown) was a '''prince''' of the late '''Kofun period''' to the early '''Asuka period'''. He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.
== '''Career''' == In '''Suiko 10 (602)''', after his half-brother '''Prince Kurume (来目皇子)''', the Commander-in-Chief of the '''Expedition to Silla (征新羅大将軍)''', passed away, '''Prince Taima''' was appointed '''General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍)''' in '''Suiko 11 (603)'''.
He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.
== '''Lineage''' == * '''Father''': [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * '''Mother''': {{ill|Katsuragi Hiroko|ja|葛城広子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Hiroko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of '''Katsuragi Iwamura''' (葛城磐村))<ref name="shoki">『[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]』</ref><ref name="shou">『{{ill|Honchō kōin jōunroku|ja|本朝皇胤紹運録|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honchō kōin jōunroku|1=Honchō Kōin Shōunroku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520403}}』</ref>, or '''Katsuragi Ihibiko no Iratsume''' (葛木伊比古郎女), daughter of '''Taimadera Kura-no-Muraji Hiriko (当麻倉首比里古)''' or '''Taimadera Kura-no-Hiko (当麻倉日子)'''.<ref name="kojiki">『[[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]』</ref> * '''Wife''': {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]

Prince Taima (当麻皇子, たいま の みこ; born between '''Emperor Bidatsu 3''' (574?) and '''Emperor Yōmei 1''' (586?), date of death unknown) was a '''prince''' of the late '''Kofun period''' to the early '''Asuka period'''. He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.

He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.

He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.
== '''Career''' == In '''Suiko 10 (602)''', after his half-brother '''Prince Kurume (来目皇子)''', the Commander-in-Chief of the '''Expedition to Silla (征新羅大将軍)''', passed away, '''Prince Taima''' was appointed '''General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍)''' in '''Suiko 11 (603)'''.
He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.

Prince Taima (当麻皇子, たいま の みこ; born between '''Emperor Bidatsu 3''' (574?) and '''Emperor Yōmei 1''' (586?), date of death unknown) was a '''prince''' of the late '''Kofun period''' to the early '''Asuka period'''. He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.
== '''Career''' == In '''Suiko 10 (602)''', after his half-brother '''Prince Kurume (来目皇子)''', the Commander-in-Chief of the '''Expedition to Silla (征新羅大将軍)''', passed away, '''Prince Taima''' was appointed '''General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍)''' in '''Suiko 11 (603)'''.
He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.
== '''Lineage''' == * '''Father''': {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei}} * '''Mother''': {{ill|Katsuragi Hiroko|ja|葛城広子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Hiroko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of '''Katsuragi Iwamura''' (葛城磐村))<ref name="shoki">『{{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki}}』</ref><ref name="shou">『{{ill|Honchō kōin jōunroku|ja|本朝皇胤紹運録|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honchō kōin jōunroku|1=Honchō Kōin Shōunroku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520403}}』</ref>, or '''Katsuragi Ihibiko no Iratsume''' (葛木伊比古郎女), daughter of '''Taimadera Kura-no-Muraji Hiriko (当麻倉首比里古)''' or '''Taimadera Kura-no-Hiko (当麻倉日子)'''.<ref name="kojiki">『{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}』</ref> * '''Wife''': {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|WD=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:当麻皇子]][[ko:타이마노미코]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:当麻皇子]][[ko:타이마노미코]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:当麻皇子]][[ko:타이마노미코]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0550|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|spouse={{ill|Toneri no himemiko|WD=Q106095792}}|children={{ill|Toyohama Taima|WD=Q17225062}}|father={{ill|Yōmei|WD=Q349281}}|relatives={{ill|Kume|WD=Q11523737}}; {{ill|Prince Ekuri|WD=Q11547041}}; {{ill|Prince Manda|WD=Q11617932}}; {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|WD=Q263972}}; {{ill|Prince Tame|WD=Q11577211}}; {{ill|Sukatehime no Himemiko|WD=Q11644412}}}} {{Infobox royalty | name = Prince Taima | native_name = 当麻皇子 | family_name & title = | image = | image_size = | image_caption = | relation = Third {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=son}} of the 31st {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei}} | title = | full_name = | Rank = | honorific = | emblem = | birth_date = [[Emperor Bidatsu]] 3 (c. {{ill|574|en|574|WD=Q32597|lt=574}}) – {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei}} 1 (c. {{ill|586|en|586|WD=Q32151|lt=586}}) | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = | burial_place = | spouse1 = {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|WD=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei}}) | spouse2 = | children = | father = {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei}} (31st {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}}) | position = General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍) | religion = | signature = }}
Prince Taima (当麻皇子, たいま の みこ; born between '''Emperor Bidatsu 3''' (574?) and '''Emperor Yōmei 1''' (586?), date of death unknown) was a '''prince''' of the late '''Kofun period''' to the early '''Asuka period'''. He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.
== '''Career''' == In '''Suiko 10 (602)''', after his half-brother '''Prince Kurume (来目皇子)''', the Commander-in-Chief of the '''Expedition to Silla (征新羅大将軍)''', passed away, '''Prince Taima''' was appointed '''General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍)''' in '''Suiko 11 (603)'''.
He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.
== '''Lineage''' == * '''Father''': {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei}} * '''Mother''': {{ill|Katsuragi Hiroko|ja|葛城広子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Hiroko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of '''Katsuragi Iwamura''' (葛城磐村))<ref name="shoki">『{{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki}}』</ref><ref name="shou">『{{ill|Honchō kōin jōunroku|ja|本朝皇胤紹運録|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honchō kōin jōunroku|1=Honchō Kōin Shōunroku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520403}}』</ref>, or '''Katsuragi Ihibiko no Iratsume''' (葛木伊比古郎女), daughter of '''Taimadera Kura-no-Muraji Hiriko (当麻倉首比里古)''' or '''Taimadera Kura-no-Hiko (当麻倉日子)'''.<ref name="kojiki">『{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}』</ref> * '''Wife''': {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|WD=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei}}

Prince Taima (当麻皇子, たいま の みこ; born between '''Emperor Bidatsu 3''' (574?) and '''Emperor Yōmei 1''' (586?), date of death unknown) was a '''prince''' of the late '''Kofun period''' to the early '''Asuka period'''. He was also known as '''Prince Maroko (麻呂子皇子)'''. He was the '''third son of Emperor Yōmei'''. His descendants included the '''Taima clan (当麻氏)''', who became mid-level officials, and the '''Taima-Takada clan (当麻高田氏)''', a samurai family active in the '''Hirata estate (平田荘)''', centered around Yamato-Takada. He is also associated with the '''Oni-slaying legend of Ōeyama (大江山鬼退治伝説)'''.
== '''Career''' == In '''Suiko 10 (602)''', after his half-brother '''Prince Kurume (来目皇子)''', the Commander-in-Chief of the '''Expedition to Silla (征新羅大将軍)''', passed away, '''Prince Taima''' was appointed '''General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍)''' in '''Suiko 11 (603)'''.
He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.
== '''Lineage''' == * '''Father''': {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei|1=Emperor Yōmei}} * '''Mother''': {{ill|Katsuragi Hiroko|ja|葛城広子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Hiroko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of '''Katsuragi Iwamura''' (葛城磐村))<ref name="shoki">『{{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}』</ref><ref name="shou">『{{ill|Honchō kōin jōunroku|ja|本朝皇胤紹運録|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honchō kōin jōunroku|1=Honchō Kōin Shōunroku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520403}}』</ref>, or '''Katsuragi Ihibiko no Iratsume''' (葛木伊比古郎女), daughter of '''Taimadera Kura-no-Muraji Hiriko (当麻倉首比里古)''' or '''Taimadera Kura-no-Hiko (当麻倉日子)'''.<ref name="kojiki">『{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}』</ref> * '''Wife''': {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|WD=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei|1=Emperor Kinmei}}

== '''Career''' == In '''Suiko 10 (602)''', after his half-brother '''Prince Kurume (来目皇子)''', the Commander-in-Chief of the '''Expedition to Silla (征新羅大将軍)''', passed away, '''Prince Taima''' was appointed '''General of the Expedition to Silla (征新羅将軍)''' in '''Suiko 11 (603)'''.
He '''departed from Naniwa (難波) by ship''', but upon arriving in '''Akashi (明石), Harima Province (播磨国)''', his wife, '''Princess Toneri (舎人皇女)''', passed away. As a result, he '''buried her in Akashi''' and '''returned home'''.
== '''Lineage''' == * '''Father''': {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei|1=Emperor Yōmei}} * '''Mother''': {{ill|Katsuragi Hiroko|ja|葛城広子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Hiroko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of '''Katsuragi Iwamura''' (葛城磐村))<ref name="shoki">『{{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}』</ref><ref name="shou">『{{ill|Honchō kōin jōunroku|ja|本朝皇胤紹運録|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honchō kōin jōunroku|1=Honchō Kōin Shōunroku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520403}}』</ref>, or '''Katsuragi Ihibiko no Iratsume''' (葛木伊比古郎女), daughter of '''Taimadera Kura-no-Muraji Hiriko (当麻倉首比里古)''' or '''Taimadera Kura-no-Hiko (当麻倉日子)'''.<ref name="kojiki">『{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}』</ref> * '''Wife''': {{ill|Princess Toneri|ja|舎人皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Toneri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|WD=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei|1=Emperor Kinmei}}
